note: TUNED, not DERIVED: per-borg attack primary/timing/projectile traits are generated from weapon-attachment and animation asset evidence. Hit-bin move records remain structurally parsed but semantically undecoded, so combat.ts keeps a generic fallback for missing profile fields. Combo chain length (melee.comboHits) counts real exported swing banks; charge shots (shot.chargeable) are the UNION of the OBSERVED_WIKI 'B Charge' move catalog (borgMoveProperties.json) with the retained TUNED beam/heavy family heuristic + the G Red hero line; shot.chargedVisualKind and the special.archetype/'projectile' params are TUNED-visual groundwork keyed off OBSERVED_WIKI move names + projectileVisualFamilies.json (data-only until the runtime waves consume them); sword-beam finishers (melee.swordBeam) key off sword-family melee-primary borgs + the hero line. All numeric values for those mechanics are TUNED.
